content.body: We probably need a hyperlink element section in the dev edition so stop and restart makes sense to me
Note that there's already an "API for hyperlink elements" section: https://html.spec.whatwg.org/dev/links.html#api-for-hyperlink-elements

Luke Warlow should fix this regression, but as part of the larger overhaul towards "hyperlink element" meaning a, area, SVG a, and MathML a, it should probably eventually supplant the existing "Links created by a and area elements" section. And then the API section is just an aspect of that.
